home.heroHeadline:
Production-grade systems.
Architected to ship, built to last.
home.heroSubline: Full-stack engineering, AI integration, and scalable platforms — from first design sketch to live deployment.

featuredFlagship.headline: FundsLink Academy
featuredFlagship.problem: 342,000+ students excluded yearly due to fragmented bursary applications, duplicated processes, and funding scattered across disconnected portals.
featuredFlagship.solution: A single digital front door for funding with structured eligibility capture, centralized applications, and a planned AI-assisted matching layer.
featuredFlagship.result: A production-ready backbone with clear architecture, ready for FastAPI/LangChain AI matching.

home.heroFooterNote: Portfolio built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

narrative.title: What this portfolio is about
paragraphs: I design and build practical digital systems that solve real-world challenges. Before writing code I complete full platform architecture, user flows, system modules, database structures, and interface designs.

Development happens sequentially — one system at a time — ensuring stability and deep technical understanding. Every system uses the same backbone: Next.js surface, service layer, Prisma, PostgreSQL, and optional Python AI where intelligence is justified.

teasersSection.title: Where the evidence lives
teasersSection.description: Home stays narrative. Catalogs and layer breakdowns stay on dedicated pages.

flagship.title: Systems catalog
flagship.body: Four platforms in flight — each with problem framing, architecture, stack, and phase. Built like products, documented like serious engineering.

stack.title: Toolchain by layer
stack.body: Frontend, API, data, AI, and delivery — the actual tools used to ship and operate platforms, organized for scanning by role.

whatBuildSection.title: What I Build

items.title: Full-Stack Engineering

items.title: Cloud Architecture
items.description: Docker, AWS, CI/CD, and scalable deployment pipelines built for reliability.

home.heroAsideBody: Design and documentation before code. One flagship system at a time — architecture, contracts, and validation gates that match how serious platforms ship.

contact.title: Ready to build something?
